reasons: Deflated Sharpe is 0.21 (< 0.95): after correcting for 27 trial(s) and fat tails, the edge is not convincingly positive.
PBO is 0.53 (>= 0.50): the in-sample best configuration is no better than a coin flip out of sample.
Bootstrap P(SR<=0) is 0.07: the Sharpe stays positive across resamples (selection-blind: a cherry-picked curve can still look good here).
80% of walk-forward folds are positive: performance is reasonably stable across time (selection-blind).
